description: Proficiency at the advanced level in listening, speaking, reading and writing, using communicative approaches. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department. Not open to students with credit for LCA LANG 504 prior to Fall 2019.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 343(or LCA LANG 503 prior to Fall 2019)

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 343(or LCA LANG 503 prior to Fall 2019)
